articles.title: APPLE JUST TRADED YOUR PRIVACY FOR $20 BILLION…
articles.summary: In a secret deal to keep Google as the primary search engine on iPhones, Apple continues to fuel Google's ad revenue engine which made an eye-popping +$250B in 2024.

articles.title: INVEST IN MODE'S PRE-IPO OFFERING AND EARN YOUR STAKE IN THIS $1T INDUSTRY.
AMAZON LAUNCHES INTERESTS FOR PERSONALIZED SHOPPING
articles.summary: Amazon has introduced an AI-powered feature that tailors product discovery based on user-defined prompts that automatically surfaces relevant items and deals.

articles.title: OPENAI ADOPTS RIVAL ANTHROPIC'S STANDARD FOR CONNECTING AI MODELS TO DATA
articles.summary: OpenAI will support Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) across its products, enhancing AI models' data-driven capabilities. MCP, an open-source standard, allows AI models to connect with various data sources like business tools and software. Companies like Block, Replit, and Sourcegraph have adopted MCP. OpenAI plans to share more about its integration soon.

articles.title: ELON MUSK'S GROK AI LANDS ON TELEGRAM, GAINING ACCESS TO OVER 1 BILLION USERS: A NEW ERA FOR SEARCH AND CHAT
articles.summary: Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, is now available on Telegram, offering its sarcastic assistant to over 1 billion users. Bundled with Telegram Premium, Grok expands beyond X, enhancing the platform with real-time reasoning and coding capabilities. While it raises privacy concerns, this move positions Telegram in the competitive AI landscape alongside giants like ChatGPT and Google's Gemini.

articles.title: QWEN OMNI MODEL (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Qwen has released a model that can natively understand many different modalities while responding in either text or speech.

articles.title: A MODULAR RAG FRAMEWORK
articles.summary: RGL streamlines the RAG pipeline for graph-structured data with modular components and optimized performance. It offers up to 143x speedup over traditional methods.

articles.title: DETECTING SUBTLE DEEPFAKE MANIPULATIONS
articles.summary: Leveraging CLIP's visual encoder and parameter-efficient tuning, this method robustly detects partial deepfake forgeries across diverse datasets with minimal model changes.

articles.title: HOW TO SPEED UP AI DELIVERY IN HEALTHCARE—RELIABLY
articles.summary: Building healthcare AI solutions? You'll want to read this case study. [12] This healthcare company used Vellum's [13] CI/CD tools to reliably ship AI updates 40% faster and earn clinician trust. Get it

articles.title: FRAME AUTOREGRESSIVE VIDEO MODELING
articles.summary: FAR improves video generation by modeling temporal dependencies between frames and introduces FlexRoPE to better handle long-range contexts using temporal decay.

articles.title: ENHANCED MULTIMODAL VISION FOUNDATION MODELS
articles.summary: The CoMP pipeline improves cross-modal alignment and resolution adaptability in vision-language models through continual pretraining and custom embeddings.

articles.title: IMPROVED 3D GAUSSIAN SPLATTING WITH HOGS
articles.summary: HoGS boosts rendering accuracy of distant objects in 3DGS pipelines using homogeneous coordinates, enabling better performance in outdoor scene reconstruction.

articles.title: OPENAI RESEARCH LEAD NOAM BROWN THINKS CERTAIN AI 'REASONING' MODELS COULD'VE ARRIVED DECADES AGO
articles.summary: AI reasoning models could have emerged 20 years earlier with the right approach and algorithms. Academic institutions can still contribute by focusing on areas requiring less computing, such as model architecture design. The poor state of AI benchmarks is an area where academia can make a significant impact.

articles.title: AI COMPANIONS: WEIRD AND CREEPY OR WORTH YOUR ATTENTION?
articles.summary: AI companions, which offer personalized and empathetic interactions, are rapidly transitioning from fantasy to reality. They are particularly appealing to Gen Z and Gen Alpha for safe exploration and engagement. Despite challenges like quirky interactions and emotional boundary concerns, AI companions provide substantial value by enhancing online experiences, storytelling, and personalized learning. Companies like Genies are leveraging avatar technology and generative AI to create immersive, context-aware digital companions that aim to form authentic connections with users.

articles.title: HOW TRUMP'S AI CZAR PLANS TO REWRITE US TECH POLICY
articles.summary: President Trump has appointed David Sacks as AI and cryptocurrency czar. Tasked with leading the Presidential Council of Advisors for Science and Technology, Sacks, alongside others, is charged with crafting a new AI action plan to replace what he describes as burdensome regulations from the previous administration. Sacks has raised concerns about China's AI advancements and emphasized the need for the US to ease regulations to maintain its leadership in AI.

articles.title: APPLE FACES LAWSUIT OVER APPLE INTELLIGENCE DELAYS
articles.summary: Apple is facing a class-action lawsuit for allegedly misleading advertising regarding its Apple Intelligence features.

articles.title: HOLLYWOOD VS AI: 400 CELEBS URGE TRUMP TO REIN IN OPENAI, GOOGLE
articles.summary: Hollywood creatives have signed an open letter urging the U.S. government not to weaken copyright protections for AI companies like OpenAI and Google.

articles.title: AI-DRIVEN WEATHER PREDICTION BREAKTHROUGH REPORTED
articles.summary: Aardvark Weather introduces an AI approach capable of delivering faster and more accurate weather forecasts using significantly less computing power than traditional systems.
